mapper.insert: insert into sync_job_record ( job_name, start_time, run_status, create_time, update_time ) values ( #{jobName}, #{startTime}, #{runStatus}, now(), now() )
mapper.update: update sync_job_record set end_time = #{endTime}, run_status = #{runStatus}, error_msg = #{errorMsg}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
